text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Empires weren't built in a day! Now, it's time for
my daily practice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, ahh. Good, my throat seems fine today.
Excellent.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The treble is quite weak. It's not
conveying my first-rate majesty at all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, that's subpar... A true first-rate laugh
demands MORE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, King Halo arrives at the practice field
looking exhausted.
